events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: From stadium-filling anthems to iconic solos, Brian May turns 79 today. What's your favourite Queen track powered by his unmistakable guitar?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding stages worldwide! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Didn't Kill It
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us, is it? What's the first music video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Masterpiece
angles.copy: It's been 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite anthem from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music Legacy
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What's the greatest festival moment you've ever witnessed?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legend continue to inspire. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Shooting
events.blurb: On September 7, 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, tragically passing away on September 13. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, whose voice defined a generation. His legacy continues to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, the man who redefined the electric guitar, 56 years after his passing. Which of his tracks still gives you goosebumps?

events.title: The Beatles Release 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: More than just an album, 'Abbey Road' gave us one of the most famous covers in music history. What's your favourite track from The Beatles' masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and songwriting have left an indelible mark on music. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that undeniable swagger to the stage. What's your top track from the iconic Mancunian?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Released
events.blurb: John Lennon's enduring peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: A World of Peace
angles.copy: 49 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' offered a vision of peace. Its message is as powerful today as it was then. What does this iconic song mean to you?

events.title: Apple Released the First iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listened to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the very first 007 film, 'Dr. No', which premiered on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to legendary theme tunes, who is your favourite Bond and what's your top 007 film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder and peace activist, John Lennon, born October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to resonate globally.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite moment from this comedy icon?
